session.user: Run `make lint ty` from the repository root and report results. DO NOT fix any errors - just run the commands and report what happened.
session.assistant: I'll run the lint and type checking commands and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run make lint ty from repository root

session.tool_result: uv run ruff check All checks passed! uv run ty check All checks passed!
session.assistant:
Perfect! Both checks passed successfully.
## Results Summary
**ruff check**: All checks passed!
**ty check**: All checks passed!
The repository is clean with no linting violations or type checking errors.
